title: Mob Player Animator Neo
description: an unofficial port of mob player animator to neoforge 1.21.1
body:
**This mod brings [Mob Player Animator](https://modrinth.com/mod/mob-player-animator) to NeoForge 1.21.1!!!!**

All credit goes to the original maker of this mod.

[Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) and [playerAnimator](https://modrinth.com/mod/playeranimator) are **required** for this mod to work.

---

An add-on mod to [Player Animator](https://modrinth.com/mod/playeranimator) that allows it to work with humanoid mobs.

Like Player Animator, it is a library, it does not do anything on its own. It was developed primarily for [Better Mob Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-mob-combat).

It is compatible with [Guard Villagers](https://modrinth.com/mod/guard-villagers) and [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features).

Existing incompatibilities between Player Animator and Entity Model Features are fixed by this mod through config options.

An Entity Model Features variable is included, called "is_playeranimator_animation_active", for use in CEM packs.
